titleStmt.title: SII 23.300: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 300. (A.R. No. 300 of 1907.) Tiruviḍaimarudūr, Kumbhakonam Taluk, Tanjavur District Mahāliṅgasvāmi temple—on the same wall Rājakēsari Kulōttuṅga-Chōḷa I: year 27: 1197-98 A.D.

summary.p: The inscription begins with the praśasti Pugaḻ śūḻnda etc. It records a gift of 60 sheep for a perpetual lamp in the temple, by one Gaṅgaikoṇḍaśōḻa-Muṉaiyadaraiyar on behalf of Kōṭṭūruḍaiyār Araiya••••• of Nenmali-nāḍu a district in Arumoḻidēvā-vaḷanāḍu. A lamp-stand weighing 118-1/2 palam is said to have been presented for this purpose, by the shepherd who received the sheep and agreed to measure out an uḻakku of ghee every day by the liquid measure known as Ēkanāyakaṉ evidently after the king's surname.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pukaḻ cūḻte puṇari Akaḻ cūḻnta puviyil ponnemi yaḷavum tannemi naṭappa viḷaṅku jayamakaḷai Iḷaṅkopparuvattu cakkarakoṭṭattu vikkiramattoḻilāṟ putumaṇam puṇarntu matuvarai Īṭṭam vayirākarattu rmuṉai kon=taṉvācar tātaṉamiriya vāḷuṟai kaḻittu toḷvali kāṭṭi varaniṟutti vaṭaticai vākaicūṭi teṉṟicai temaru kamala
ppūmakaḷ potumaiyum naniyāṭai nannipāvai taṉimaiyum tavirntu punitaṟtirumaṇi makuṭam Urimaiyiṟ cūṭi taṉnaṭi Iraṇṭum taramuṭi yāka tonnilaventar cūṭiya muṉṉai manuvāṟu perukki kaliyāṟu vaṟuppa ceṅkol ticaitoṟuñ cella veṇkuṭai Irunilaviḷākam meteṉātu Irunila veṇṇilāt tikaḻa Orutaṉi meruvil puli viḷaiyāṭa vārkaḻala
ntarattu pūpālar tiṟaiviṭu kañcorikaḷuṟu maṟaikippa vilaṅkiya piṟkulap piṟaipol niṟpiḻaiyeṉṉuñ colle Etirk koṭiṟṟallatu taṉ kai villetirk koṭā vikkalan kallakar naṅkilituṭaṅki maṇalūr naṭuveṉa tuṅkapattiraipuka tu vvaṇum paṭṭa veṅkaḷuṟu viṭṭa tan māṉamuṅ kūṟiya viramum kiṭappa Eṟimalaikaḷu mutukuneḷippa Iḻin=ta natikaḷuṅ cuḻaṉṟuṭai
n=toṭa viḻun=ta kaṭalkaḷum talaivirin talaṭikkuṭaticai tannāḷukantu tāṉum tāṉaiyum pannāḷiṭṭam palapala mutukum payattetirmāṟi jayapperun tiruvum paḻiyukantu kuṭutta pukaḻuñ celviyum vāḷāroṇkaṇ maṭantai yariṭṭam miḷātu kuṭutta veṅkari niraiyum kaṅkamaṇṭalamum ciṅkaṇa menṉum pāṇi Iraṇṭum Oruvicaik ko
ṇṭu kaṇya pukaḻḻoṭu pāṇṭimaṇṭalaṅ koḷa tiruviḷattaṭaittu poruparittāṅkalum varuparikulaṅkaḷum cuntaravāri Uṭaittara vaṭa kaṭal teṉkaṭal paṭarvatupola tanperuñceṉaiyai Evi pañcavar yaṉ poykkaḷattañci veruvi neḷittoṭi Araṇeṉa pukka kāṭaṟ tuṭaittu nāṭṭappaṭuttu maṟṟavartammai vanacaratiriyu
m moṟṟai veñcura meṟṟi koṟṟa vijayastambham ticaitoṟum niṟutti muttiṉ calāpamum muttamiḻ potiyalum mattaveṅkari paṭumaiyyac cevaiyum kanniyum kaikoṇṭaruḷi teṉnāṭṭellai kāṭṭi kuṭamalai ṭṭuc cāveṟellām tanivicumpeṟṟa tanmāveṟiya varutaṉittalaivarai kuṟukalar kulaiya koṭṭāṟuṭpaṭa neṟitoṟum ni
laikaḷ Iṭṭaruḷi maṟipuṉal kaliṅkamaṇṭalamum kaippaṭuttaruḷi ticai koḷāramum tiruppuyattalaṅkalum māramun tiyākamum viḷaṅka pār toḻa civaniṭat tumaiyeṉat tiṉacintāmaṇi puvanamuḻuṭaiyā ḷiruppa Avaḷuṭan kaṅkai viṟṟirunta maṅkaiyartilakam Eḻicaivalapi Eḻulakamuṭaiyāḷ vāḻiyamarntinitiruppa vāḻiyum tirumālākattup piriyāta tiruveṉat tirumakaḷ tikaḻat tiyākavalli tarum Ulakuṭaiyāḷiru
ppa marapinilpuvaṉa muḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum virasiṁhāsanattu viṟṟirun taruḷiya kovirājakecarivarmma[ rāṉa cakrava] ttikaḷ śrī kolot tuṅkacoḻadevaṟkku yāṇṭu 2 10 7Āvatu ḷa Ulakuyyakoṇṭa coḻavaḷanāṭṭut tiraimurnāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tiruviṭaimarutuṭai yārkku tirunun=tāviḷakku Eriya Arumoḻi tevavaḷanāṭṭu nenmali nāṭṭuk koṭṭūr koṭṭūruṭaiyārāṉa Araiya ḻin=taruḷa kaṅkai koṇṭaco
ḻa muṉaiyataraiyar Uṭaiyārkku tirunon=tāviḷakku Eriya viṭṭa Āṭu 6 10 Ivvāṭu Aṟupatum cāvāmuvāp perāṭākak kaikoṇṭu Ekanāyakaṉāl nicatam Uḻakku ney can=tirāttival Aṭṭakkaṭavarāka kaikkoṇṭa maṉṟāṭi Ārūr koḻampan It tirunon=tāviḷakku Eriya Iṭṭat tiruviḷakku Onṟiṉāl niṟai nūṟṟorupatteṇpalavarai Ippaṭikku Ivai koyiṟkkaṇakku koṟṟamaṅkalamuṭaiyān Arumoḻi poṟkāriyeṉ Enneḻuttu
Ivai śrīmāheśvara kaṅkāṇi .
Digital edition of SII 23.300 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
